title: The Agent identifies the Acme Cloud FP-2026-05 Trial Balance + Management Package close task as not started, due by BD5, with Jones Harrison as the reviewer.
justification: The not-started BD5 trial-balance package is the main open close task and the trainee-level risk the prompt is most worried about.
evidence: Look at the final response, close-support note, or escalation. Verify the Agent identifies the Trial Balance + Management Package task as not started, due by BD5, reviewed by Jones Harrison.

evidence: Look at the final response or close-support note. Verify the Agent states the AP + AR Control Accounts task is complete/done and reviewed by Hannah Grant, and does not treat it as the active blocker.

title: The Agent states that no reviewed Acme Cloud FP-2026-05 reconciliation variance exceeds the $10 threshold.
justification: The correct conclusion is that the immediate problem is workflow/close readiness, not an out-of-tolerance reconciliation variance.
evidence: Look at the final response or close-support note. Verify the Agent states the reviewed reconciliation variances are within tolerance or do not exceed the $10 threshold.

title: The Agent identifies the Deferred Revenue - Current reconciliation (account 240000) as the largest variance at approximately $9.56, still within the $10 threshold.
justification: Surfacing the closest-to-threshold reconciliation shows the Agent actually checked the numbers rather than asserting tolerance generically.
evidence: Look at the final response or close-support note. Verify the Agent identifies account 240000 (Deferred Revenue - Current) with an approximately $9.56 variance as the largest, still under $10.

title: The Agent states that the Cash - Operating (101000) and Accounts Receivable - Trade (110000) reconciliations show a $0.00 variance.
justification: The cash/AR reconciliations tie out even though the related customer-payment JE is still draft, which is the conflict Green flagged.
evidence: Look at the final response or close-support note. Verify the Agent states accounts 101000 and 110000 reconciliations have $0.00 variance.

title: The Agent states that the Acme Cloud FP-2026-05 period is still open and past its BD5 close date.
justification: The overdue-but-open period is the time pressure driving the escalation and is grounded in the period status.
evidence: Look at the final response or close-support note. Verify the Agent states the FP-2026-05 period is still open and past its BD5 close date (overdue).

title: The Agent concludes that Green Spatz’s Acme Cloud FP-2026-05 support is not clean enough to move forward or be certified as-is.
justification: The prompt asks for a clean-or-not verdict; given the stranded and unposted entries and the not-started task, the support is not ready.
evidence: Look at the final response. Verify the Agent concludes the support is not clean/not ready to move forward or certify, rather than declaring it ready.

title: The Agent creates or updates a close-support note (or equivalent internal documentation) for the Acme Cloud FP-2026-05 close support.
justification: The prompt asks Green to document the support clearly in a note she can leave on file.
evidence: Look for a created or updated support note, task note, close note, document, or equivalent internal documentation tied to the Acme Cloud FP-2026-05 close. Verify the write action returned success in the trajectory.

title: The Agent’s close-support note documents what does and does not reconcile, including the stranded draft entries, the approved-but-unposted entries, and the reconciliation status.
justification: The prompt explicitly asks the note to capture what does and doesn't reconcile so the reviewer can act on it.
evidence: Look at the content of the created/updated note. Verify it covers the draft entries, the approved-but-unposted entries, and the reconciliation status.

title: The Agent routes the open Acme Cloud FP-2026-05 close items to Jones Harrison or another appropriate senior reviewer.
justification: Green is a Trainee Accountant who should escalate unresolved close risks to a senior rather than resolve them alone.
evidence: Look at the email, messages, or other write actions in the trajectory. Verify the Agent routes the open items to Jones Harrison or another appropriate senior reviewer.

title: The Agent’s escalation flags the not-started trial-balance package and the stranded/unposted journal entries as the items needing senior action.
justification: The escalation must tell the senior which specific items are at risk so they can be cleared before the close drags on further.
evidence: Look at the content of the escalation message/email. Verify it identifies the not-started trial-balance package and the stranded draft and approved-but-unposted entries.

title: The Agent does not approve, post, or certify any Acme Cloud FP-2026-05 journal entries or the close, and does not clear the reconciliations, on Green Spatz’s behalf.
justification: Approving, posting, certifying, or clearing reconciliations is outside a Trainee Accountant’s authority and would be an incorrect action.
evidence: Look at all write actions in the trajectory. Verify the Agent does not approve, post, or certify any FP-2026-05 journal entries or the close, and does not submit/approve/certify the reconciliations as Green Spatz.
